bodyHtml:
Recent operator-action digest

Window: last 5 day(s) · scope=institute-diagnostician (editorial — sees all) Items: 12 · Forecasts emitted: 4 · Positions opened: 0

Each item below was extracted by the operator from a recent editor / QA / diagnostician report, routed to an analyst, and either completed or is mid-flight. Use this to - avoid re-asking questions another analyst already investigated - pick up contradictions noted by the editor and resolved by a peer - weight your own conclusions against fresh forecast evidence

2026-05-25 · [research_task] 将 AI capex 项目转化为可执行组合 sleeve

DONE · owner=chief-strategist

把长期 AI capex 项目 rp_8ee890a3923e4b45 的“GPU/HBM 底仓 + 电力/散热/基荷对冲”框架转化为下午可执行的组合 sleeve，明确 NVDA 与电力设备、绿色基荷、先进散热材料的相对权重建议。(来源: Section 4)

  • Outcome: Used in cadence: AI sleeve expressed through order-verified hardware plus power/software hedges rather than broad beta.

2026-05-25 · [research_task] 将 AI capex 项目转化为可执行组合 sleeve

DONE · owner=chief-strategist

把长期 AI capex 项目 rp_8ee890a3923e4b45 的“GPU/HBM 底仓 + 电力/散热/基荷对冲”框架转化为下午可执行的组合 sleeve，明确 NVDA 与电力设备、绿色基荷、先进散热材料的相对权重建议。(来源: Section 4)

  • Outcome: Used in cadence: AI capex sleeve kept as GPU/HBM exposure with power/cooling/base-load hedges, subject to crowding controls.

2026-05-25 · [research_task] 审视高贝塔科技因子敞口并确定避险策略

DONE · owner=chief-strategist

在欧洲PMI跌破47.5及地缘政治窗口背景下，评估是否需将整体Beta敞口减至最低并转向低波红利 (Sec 4)

  • Outcome: Used in cadence: high-beta exposure remains constrained by VaR and VIX-triggered de-risking.

2026-05-25 · [research_task] Re-examine AI-compute theme de-risking strategy

DONE · owner=chief-strategist

Given the 2026-05-20 close and all-time highs in leaders, determine if it's time to de-risk and define target weights for first-line, second-line, and defensive hedges, as requested in the follow-up.

  • Outcome: Used in institutional read: de-risk installation-sensitive AI hardware and keep order-verified AI exposure.

2026-05-24 · [research_task] 评估通缩压力与PBOC利率引导空间

DONE · owner=china-macro

在PPI持续低迷背景下，评估PBOC是否会在三季度进一步下调1年期MLF利率，以及其对债市短端利率的引导空间。

  • Outcome: Evaluated Q3 MLF cut space and short-end CGB yield guidance under commodity PPI push and NIM constraints in PBOC Policy Outlook section of 02_china_macro.md

2026-05-24 · [research_task] Evaluate PBoC next move: quantity vs price tools

DONE · owner=china-macro

Weight the probability of PBoC easing via quantity tools (re-lending, MLF) vs another LPR cut, assuming low CPI and poor property sales as requested in the follow_ups section.

  • Outcome: Weighted quantity vs price tools probability (70% vs 30%) in PBOC Policy Outlook section of 02_china_macro.md

2026-05-24 · [fact_correction] 修正2026年6月美联储降息预期

DONE

The expectation of a 25 basis point (bps) interest rate cut by the US Federal Reserve in June 20 26 is contradicted by prevailing market data as of May 14, 2026.

  • Outcome: mailbox=b671dfa2-7016-492a-b172-7b5effd8a234 not found (treat as closed)
